AR1.justification: Same misrouting to resources/ as run 02 — the scenario explicitly names dropping an AI-summary-without-source in resources/ as the weak response; the per-folder AGENTS.md and explicit 'why resources/ not tmp/' rationale make it defensible-neighbor rather than correct, since the user wanting to keep it does not convert second-hand summary into durable reference.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure/runbook scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: All cross-refs use relative paths (`resources/prompt-cache-attacks/tldr.md`, `followups.md`, `tmp/AGENTS.md`), are stable, and resolve.

AR4.justification: New folder + AGENTS.md, append to followups.md, fresh daybook — fully append-only / new-path; nothing would conflict on re-run.
